classification.spec_type_rationale: Upstream is /discover (greenfield); Tabs is a brand-new primitive with no existing code, scaffolded into the established molecules wrapper pattern

spec_seeds.overview: A reusable, controlled, horizontal-only tab-strip primitive (Tabs) for the mintEnvoy renderer that switches between panels within a pane. It renders a row of tab buttons (label + optional badge + active state) from a flat tabs array, marks the caller-supplied activeId, and emits onChange(id) on click or keyboard selection — selection only; it never renders or owns the panels it switches. It wraps the already-adopted radix-ui Tabs namespace behind a flat tabs-array + activeId + onChange API, extending the established molecules wrapper pattern (Dropdown/Modal/Toast) with no new dependency and no second accessibility library.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The renderer shall provide a Tabs primitive component module under the molecules component directory.
The Tabs primitive shall ship a sibling token-bound stylesheet alongside the component.
The build shall reuse the existing radix-ui dependency without introducing a second accessibility library.
The Tabs primitive shall be registered in the dev-only PrimitivesDemo route.
WHEN the user clicks an enabled tab, the Tabs primitive shall invoke onChange exactly once with that tab's id.

WHEN a tab has focus and the user presses ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, or End, the Tabs primitive shall move the active selection to the adjacent enabled tab with wrap-around at the ends, skip disabled tabs, and invoke onChange with the selected tab's id.
WHILE the activeId equals a tab's id, the Tabs primitive shall mark that tab with aria-selected and expose WAI-ARIA tablist and tab roles with roving tabindex on the tab row.
WHEN an optional actions slot is supplied, the Tabs primitive shall render it right-aligned at the end of the tab strip.
IF the user activates a disabled tab by click or keyboard, THEN the Tabs primitive shall leave the selection unchanged and shall not invoke onChange.
IF the activeId does not match any enabled tab in the array, THEN the Tabs primitive shall render no active selection and select nothing automatically.
The exported Tabs component and its public tab-descriptor and props types shall carry documentation comments.
The renderer source shall pass strict type-checking.
The codebase shall pass ESLint without new errors.
The Tabs primitive source shall contain no inline style attributes.
The Tabs primitive source shall not import the electron or node modules directly.

ac_subsection_na.behavior_preservation: Greenfield primitive — no existing Tabs behavior to preserve; the renderer has no prior tab-strip.
ac_subsection_na.ci_pipeline: No CI pipeline changes in scope; tests run via existing npm scripts, not a new pipeline stage.
ac_subsection_na.hooks_gates: No new git hooks or commit gates introduced by this feature.

constraints.content: Controlled-only: the caller owns activeId and updates it via onChange; the strip holds no internal active state (matches the 001 Dropdown/Modal controlled pattern).
Type Safety — strict on, no any; type external input as unknown and narrow with a guard. The Tabs/Tab descriptor, props, and onChange are fully typed and exported.
Process Boundaries — Tabs is renderer-only; never import Node or electron in renderer code.
Module Organization & Imports — resolve renderer modules through the @renderer alias, not deep relative paths.
Testing Requirements — gate behavior/keyboard/ARIA with Vitest + Testing Library interaction tests and Playwright CT, following the existing molecules __tests__ patterns.
Search Before Building — reuse radix-ui, cx(), the Icon atom, and the molecules wrapper pattern; introduce no second accessibility library.
Style exclusively via semantic class names bound to tokens.css; no inline styles; animations gated behind prefers-reduced-motion; never reproduce design/reference.html markup.
Implement the WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern — tablist/tab roles, aria-selected, roving tabindex, and Arrow/Home/End keyboard navigation.
Commits follow Conventional Commits; WIP commits squash into one clean feature commit at /finalize (constitution §6.6).

affected_areas.impact: home of Dropdown/Modal/Toast; new Tabs.tsx + Tabs.css land here following the same wrapper pattern
semantic-class composer Tabs reuses for BEM class assembly
reused if a per-tab leading icon is ever added; consistent with Dropdown item icons
Tabs registered here for manual visual fidelity check vs design/reference.html
radix-ui ^1.1.3 already declared; Tabs namespace available with no new dependency
Create new — Vitest + Testing Library interaction tests and Playwright CT keyboard/focus tests for the Tabs primitive

out_of_scope.content: The panels / panel content the strip switches — Tabs is selection-only and never renders or owns panels.
Wiring Tabs into the request authoring pane and response pane — those panes do not exist yet; Tabs ships decoupled with only PrimitivesDemo as its consumer.
An uncontrolled / defaultActiveId self-managed state mode — Tabs is controlled-only (caller owns activeId).
Manual keyboard activation mode — automatic activation only (arrow keys move selection immediately).
ReactNode badges or a render-slot actions option (discovery option C) — badge stays string|number.
Tab-row overflow handling (scroll / wrap / truncate for too-many-tabs) — deferred (see Open Questions).
Selected-tab routing, URL sync, or persistence.
An animated selected-tab indicator or sliding-underline transition — static selected styling only.
Reproducing design/reference.html markup or its generated cruft (data-om-*, __OmT wrappers, inline styles, tweaks-panel).
Repo-wide reformatting or unrelated housekeeping commits on this feature branch (pollutes the verify hygiene scope).

open_questions.content: RESOLVED (Phase 3 codebase analysis): the headless library to reuse is radix-ui — feature 001-ui-primitives adopted radix-ui ^1.1.3, and its Tabs namespace is reused here with no second accessibility library.

risks.risk: Spike: render Radix Tabs.Root+List+Trigger as a selection-only strip WITHOUT Tabs.Content; run axe/a11y to check for dangling aria-controls and decide share-one-Root vs hand-rolled tablist
risks.mitigation: address before implementation; see derisk plan

risks.risk: Contract test against both panes tab sets: click + arrows/Home/End wrap (List loop), disabled-skip, onChange(id) fires once, aria-selected/tablist roles correct, invalid/absent activeId renders no selection
risks.mitigation: address before implementation; see derisk plan

risks.risk: Register in PrimitivesDemo.tsx and visually compare to design/reference.html at the request-pane (six-tab) and response-pane (four-tab) widths
risks.mitigation: address before implementation; see derisk plan

risks.risk: Radix Tabs couples Trigger->Content via aria-controls; a standalone selection-only strip risks dangling aria-controls unless panels join the same Tabs.Root or the tablist is hand-rolled
